titleStmt.title: SII 4.1117: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1117. (A.R. No. 261 of 1893). ON THE SAME WALL; FIRST TIER FROM THE BOTTOM.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[A]styu¨rvvyāmmahimāspadasyaguṇinaḥ śrīrudraraḍḍiprabhōḥ kṣōṇīrakṣaṇadakṣadakṣiṇabhujādaṇḍasya saṇma
ntrinaḥ . yaścāmātyapadasthita . sthiramatiḥ kāmāṁbikāna(ṁ)ndanaḥ (.) śūrassatkṛtasa¨rvvabhūsuratatissaujanya
ratnākaraḥ [. 1*] sōyaṁ dakṣatapōvanē sthitavatē lōkatrayasvāminē bhīmēśāya jagatprasiddhayaśasē dīpammudā
prādiśat . śākābdē śrutirāmacaṁdraśaśigē bhānāvudīcīṁ gatēpitrōḥ svasya ca rājināyakavaraḥ puṇyābhivṛddhyaisthi
raṁ [. 2*] śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1134 nēṇṭi saṁvatsaramulu 46 śrāhi vaiśākha śukla Ēkādasiyu Ādivāramuna śrībhīmē
svaramahādēvaraku kāketirājyasama¨rthuṁḍaina rēcaṟla rudrīraḍḍi sāmaṁttuṁḍaina rājanāya kuṁḍu tama tallidaṁḍrula
ku dha¨rmmuvugāṁ beṭṭina Akhaṁḍava¨rttilōhadaṁḍu dīpa 1 ṇṭa Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamu neyi sariṁccuvārugā naluvurubōla pūṁṭa nā
lavunaḍapuna talarāsi prōlani vasamunaṁ beṭṭina Inupayeḍlu 50 ṇṭikini dribhuvanāṁkusa nē māna 1 Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamu
Digital edition of SII 4.1117 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
